name: stage2-rvv-contraction-fact-contract-owner
title: Stage2 RVV contraction realization/provider fact-contract owner
description: Strengthen the production RVV plugin fact contract between contraction selected-body realization and EmitC route-family planning so existing widening-MAcc, widening-dot, computed-mask, and strided-input contraction routes consume typed realized-body facts rather than fixture strings, route ids, artifact names, or common EmitC guesses.
